name: Session Deletion API
summary: Backend API endpoint for deleting agent sessions and cleaning up resources
goals: Remove session records and associated conversation history
Clean up any active streaming connections for the session

specDetail.description: Exposes DELETE /api/agents/sessions/:id endpoint that removes a session, its conversation history, and any associated resources. Aborts any active streaming connections.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Session ID to delete (required, path parameter)

parameters.name: force
parameters.description: Force deletion even if session has active streams (default false)

constraints: Must return 404 if session does not exist
Must abort any active agent execution before deleting
Must clean up all conversation messages and tool execution logs

acceptanceCriteria.given: a session exists with no active execution
acceptanceCriteria.then: the session and all associated data are removed and status 204 is returned

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: docs(sync-specs): implement leaf determination redesign with frontend/backend criteria
